transcript: Are you okay? I think I'm fucking okay. I just got shot, man. Just wait here for a second. Here, try to stop the bleeding for a second. What is this going to do? I gotta make a call. In Paper's house? Just stop the bleeding for a second. What is this going to do? I got to make a call. It's Paper's house! Just stop the bleeding! Fuck. Oh, uh, yeah, uh, hey, boss? You're lying, man. What the fuck is that? Zach got shot. Listen, this has to stay quiet. You didn't take him to the hospital, did you? No, but... Good. Just think about the pay. Well, but I don't think he's going to make it, is the thing. No hospitals, understood? If he won't make it, well, do what you have to. Fuck. Hey, Chris, where are you going? Chris, where are you going? Chris, where are you going? GUNFIRE Thank you.
